channel.title: Sanrio Store — News & Updates
channel.description: The latest news, arrivals, and updates from the Sanrio Store.

item.title: Spring 2026 Collection Has Arrived! 🌸
item.description: Our brand-new spring lineup is here, featuring pastel-themed plush, stationery sets, and limited-edition Hello Kitty accessories. Perfect for gifting or treating yourself this season.
item.author: Sanrio Team

item.title: Cinnamoroll Turns 23 — Celebrate With Us! 🎂
item.description: Everyone's favourite fluffy puppy is celebrating his 23rd birthday this month. Join us for exclusive in-store events, a limited birthday plush drop, and a week of special discounts.
item.author: Sanrio Team

item.title: New Kuromi × Streetwear Collaboration Drops This Friday
item.description: Kuromi goes edgy-chic in our latest streetwear collab. Hoodies, tote bags, and caps featuring bold new artwork — available online and in selected stores from Friday 13th March.
item.author: Sanrio Team

item.title: Free Shipping on All Orders Over $35 This Weekend
item.description: From Friday through Sunday, enjoy free standard shipping on any order over $35. Stock up on your favourite characters — no promo code needed, discount applied automatically at checkout.
item.author: Sanrio Store

item.title: My Melody Stationery Set Restocked After Selling Out
item.description: By popular demand, the My Melody pastel stationery set is back in stock. Includes a notebook, sticky notes, washi tape, and a pen pouch — all in the iconic pink and white palette.
item.author: Sanrio Store
